title: Changes to Board Template to update previously created boards from the same template

posts.author: afash (Anthony)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have seen conversations in the past discussing the issue of not being able to see changes made to a template transferred to previously created boards from
the template.

I had to deal with this issue. After testing and a lot of hard work. I created 100+ boards from a template and as always, once in use, a few new use cases come up. I updated the template but no way to trigger this to previously created boards.

I had to go into every board to make the required changes.

Are we closer to getting this feature implemented or is they a workaround for this issue?
